top_findings.summary: The skill is described as a "Higher-dimensional type theory proof assistant" (its primary purpose), yet the documentation includes a "Gay.jl Integration" section with code to initialize a "chromatic seed" and perform P3 extension gamut learning with color processing. This color/gamut functionality is completely unrelated to proof assistance or type theory. Additionally, the skill includes meta-information like "Skill Trit", "GF(3) Triad" calculations, and "SDF Interleaving" references that appear to be part of a skill management or tracking system rather than core functionality, suggesting potential data collection or execution of unrelated processes.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Permission Overreach & Data Over-collection - The skill is described as a "Higher-dimensional type theory proof assistant" (its primary purpose), yet the documentation includes a "Gay.jl Integration" section with code to initialize a "chromatic seed" and perform P3 extension gamut learning with color processing. This color/gamut functionality is completely unrelated to proof assistance or type theory. Additionally, the skill includes meta-information like "Skill Trit", "GF(3) Triad" calculations, and "SDF Interleaving" references that appear to be part of a skill management or tracking system rather than core functionality, suggesting potential data collection or execution of unrelated processes.
